name: Phantom Steed
description: A Large, quasi-real, horselike steed (saddle, bit, and bridle included) appears in an unoccupied space within range. For the duration you or a chosen rider can ride it; it uses the Riding Horse stat block but has a Speed of 100 feet and travels 13 miles per hour. It fades when the spell ends (1 minute to dismount) or if it takes any damage. Engine: overland travel utility narrated by the AIGM.
